userRequest: Design an AI fitness app for busy professionals who want personalized workout and nutrition guidance.

product.content:
# Product Requirements Document

## User Segment
Busy professionals seeking fast mobile-first fitness planning.

## Core Features
- AI workout planner
- Nutrition recommendations
- Reminder notifications

## Success Criteria
- 30-day retention above 35%

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can generate plans in under 30 seconds
- Users can receive mobile reminders

engineering.content:
# Technical Architecture

## Architecture
On-premise kiosk deployment for gym branches with no mobile application.

## Components
- Touchscreen kiosk frontend
- Local server and database

## Data Flow and API
Fitness plans are generated on a branch kiosk after staff input user details manually.

## Technical Risks and Constraints
- No push notification support in the current architecture
- Limited ability to integrate external model APIs because the branch network is isolated
- Hardware maintenance costs are high

finance.content:
# Commercial and Financial Report

## Target Market
Budget-conscious gym operators rather than end users.

## Cost Structure
- Kiosk hardware procurement
- Local IT maintenance
- Branch installation costs

## Revenue Assumptions
- Revenue comes from kiosk leasing to gyms

## ROI and Break-even
The business is expected to break even in 36 months if gyms adopt the kiosk network at scale.
